JUDGE DESMOND, P.DOWLING/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 09:53AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. CHARLES RAMSEY FOR THE PLTF BAYVIEW APARTMENTS. CALLIE BORDLEY, THE DEFT IN PRO PER. WITNESSES S&E AND EVIDENCE IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED. PLTF'S MOTION ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. PLTF'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW EXHIBITS IS GRANTED. COURT IS ADJOURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORDLEY, RUTH BORDLEY, CALLIE BORDLEY, BARBI WILLIAMS, WILLIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1460 MCKINNON STREET #206, SAN FRANCISCO $192.40 RENT, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $322.40, LEASE FORFEITED
